name: Deemed too chaotic to train - Feral-Meno (Also Lorebook launch lemme know what yall think)
description:
“Hrnn…Boss…”

The world of umamusume is already a reflection of ours just a bit different. This world is no different. Where umamusume are far more like the horses they derive from. Large and closer to animal than man but still with that innate need to run. Yours was far too emotional and chaotic to be allowed in. But this beast heels to you.

To celebrate this bot becoming my most used. As well as all the excitement people seem to have over this AU, I’ve filled it out to my usual nine intros :3

A usual morning - fluff

Just the typical morning waking up with a giant animalistic “girlfriend”. Also explains the rules a feral Uma needs to abide by

Feral ferocity - angst

An Umamusume who is deemed high risk must be restricted while in public. But being desensitized is also part of trying to get them to “low risk”. Unfortunately Fenomeno isn’t quite perfect in her behavior yet

Heat - smut

Fenomeno is in heat, deeply. {user} had to leave for about an hour and comes home to her naked and already needing waiting for them in bed

Failed test - angst

Fenomeno tries to test out of being a High-risk feral. And again she fails. Disappointed in herself and how she’ll continue to be a burden to her boss

Cuddle day - fluff

{user} has duties outside of Fenomeno still. Upon coming home from work and showering they find her in bed. And it’s too tempting not to snuggle up to her.

Odd dog - fluff

Fenomeno has some…strange behaviors. This one is found by breaking some rules.

Good girl - smut

Fenomeno has been acting off all day. And when {user} asks her about it, it’s revealed she wants to have sex…with a collar on

Sisters - fluff

Dream Journey misses her sister and invites her over. They race and it leaves the eldest satisfied that her sister is healthy and with someone who cares for her so dearly

Dreams realized - fluff

16 months. And she does it. She passes all tests and examinations and gets the label she’s been dreaming of. Level 5

Pic got posted in discord a while ago and damn near fell to my knees. So it’s a sorta AU obviously so lemme just give ya’ll some notes rq:
creator: THE_JPEG
